name: ProtonVPN
tagline: Swiss-based VPN from the makers of Proton Mail — security-first, open-source apps
pros: Based in Switzerland — outside 14-Eyes jurisdiction, strong privacy law
Only major VPN with fully open-source apps (Android, iOS, macOS, Windows, Linux)
Independently audited no-logs policy (by SEC Consult, 2022 and 2024)
Strong free plan (unlimited data, 3 countries, 1 device) — rare among reputable VPNs
Secure Core multi-hop routes through hardened Swiss/Iceland/Sweden servers
Bundles with Proton Mail / Drive / Calendar in the Unlimited plan
cons: More expensive than NordVPN or Surfshark on equivalent plans
Apps can be more complex for beginners (privacy-focused defaults)
Streaming unblocking is slightly less consistent than NordVPN
best_for: Users already in the Proton ecosystem
